summary: Phase 2 cinematic client gallery (ShareView) verified end-to-end via Playwright against the public share https://handoff-app-5.preview.emergentagent.com/s/eva-ella-27-06-26. All required data-testids render, couple name is parsed correctly ('Eva & Ella'), floating header + instruction cards + album grid work, album view with sticky header + info banner + download-all + share-file grid + favourites + lightbox + submit-favourites all function, coming-soon toasts fire for Order Prints & Slideshow, and theme toggle persists via localStorage 'gallery_dark_mode' across reload.

issues: Hero uses minHeight 78vh which at 800px viewport leaves the couple name / Welcome text visually near the vertical centre but with heavy dark gradient the placeholder solid-colour cover blends into the overlay — text is present in DOM but visually low-contrast on the placeholder cover (expected per note that photos are solid-colour placeholders; real photos will provide contrast).

critical_code_review_comments: ShareView.js is 352 lines and handles landing + album + favourites + lightbox in one file — approaching the split threshold; consider extracting Lightbox and Landing sub-components in a future refactor for maintainability.
coupleName() regex only strips trailing dates; folder names ending with something like 'Eva & Ella Wedding' would pass through unchanged (acceptable, but worth noting).
Watermark logo positioning uses fixed pixel width (56px thumb / 100px lightbox); on very small thumbnails it can overlap the favourite heart — minor.
test_credentials: Public share (no auth). Admin creds available in review request but not needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 ShareView redesign is fully working. All Phase-2 testids present and behaving correctly. Slideshow/PrintOrder/Video streaming are intentionally not implemented and show 'coming soon' toasts — do not flag. Placeholder photos render as solid colour blocks by design.
